strategy: This is a two-boss team fight: Copy Qhat (Ice) plus Quake Charmer. Copy Qhat summons an Elemental or Spiritual copy minion, so expect adds early.

Watch the Earthquake timer. Quake Charmer casts Earthquake at the end of every third round, wiping all blades, traps, and wards from the team. Set up and hit inside a three-round window, or Vaporize to cancel the cheat.
Hit Copy Qhat with Fire (she takes +21%, resists everything else 29%).
Both bosses chain a second spell after certain casts, so their turns hit twice; keep heals up and shield against the Fire and Myth follow-ups.
Blade the hitter, Feint the target, and burst each boss inside the Earthquake window.
cheatNotes: She summons an Elemental or Spiritual Copy Qhat minion, so expect an extra body on the board early.
After certain spells she immediately follows with a second, paired spell, so her turns hit twice; shield and heal for two hits.
Quake Charmer casts Earthquake every third round, stripping all blades, traps, and wards from the whole team; hit before it lands or you lose your setup.
Vaporize cancels the Earthquake cheat, letting your blades survive the third round.
Like Copy Qhat, Quake Charmer chains a follow-up spell after certain casts, so his damage comes in pairs too.
